## What Already Exists

### `/mnt/data/voice-transcriber/` -- Complete Python Bot (py-cord)

A fully built standalone Discord voice transcription bot using **py-cord** (discord.py fork with voice receive support). Key files:

- **`bot.py`** (396 lines) -- Full bot with `!join`, `!leave`, `!status` commands. Uses py-cord's `Sink` API to receive per-user PCM audio. Buffers audio per-user, flushes at configurable chunk size (default 8s), dispatches to Whisper...(truncated)
